notes: HAR-320 captures safe read shapes for carrier-service availability and delivery-profile locations, a controlled local-pickup enable/read/disable lifecycle with cleanup, shipping-package unknown-id error shape, and fulfillment-constraint read/write access-scope blockers. The supported local slice is enforced by the runtime integration test because the generic parity runner does not chain seeded package/location state plus meta-log assertions for this multi-root flow.
